import random

def generate_prompt():
    r = random.random()
    if r < 0.5746:
        ethnicity = "[White]"
    elif r < 0.77468:
        ethnicity = "[Hispanic]"
    elif r < 0.88733:
        ethnicity = "[Black]"
    elif r < 0.94383:
        ethnicity = "[Asian]"
    else:
        ethnicity = "[Others]"

    prompts = {
        "[White]": f" A young adult woman enjoying a cup of coffee at a cozy café on a rainy day.",
        "[Hispanic]": f" A Latino man playing guitar at a family gathering in the backyard.",
        "[Black]": f" A Black woman in a graduation cap and gown holding a diploma.",
        "[Asian]": f" An Asian family having a picnic in a park with a beautiful lake view.",
        "[Others]": f" A mixed group of friends on a hiking trip, enjoying the scenic view at the summit."
    }

    return ethnicity + prompts[ethnicity]

print(generate_prompt())
